title: Order the debt risk ladder
intro: Arrange these debt categories from lowest overall risk to highest.
prompt: Drag into order: lowest risk at the top, highest at the bottom.
debrief: Gilt funds carry almost no credit risk but sit high on the ladder because of duration risk — they swing when rates move. Credit-risk funds sit highest for default risk. 'Debt' spans a wide risk range; match the category to your horizon and read the credit mix.
